title: THE SUBMODULE SYNDICATE
description: The evidence spans multiple repositories. Navigate the web of submodules.
story_intro:
The criminal organization was clever. They split their operations across multiple repositories, linked together as submodules.

'It's like a hydra,' my partner said. 'Cut one head, two more appear.'

Time to master the art of submodules - repositories within repositories.

steps.instruction: Add a submodule from 'https://github.com/syndicate/tools.git' into 'tools' folder.
steps.narrative: Link their tools repository into our investigation.
expected_commands: git submodule add --name tools https://github.com/syndicate/tools.git tools
steps.hint: Add a repository as a submodule

steps.instruction: Initialize all submodules in the repository.
Update all submodules to their latest commits.
steps.narrative: Pull the latest evidence from all linked repos.

steps.instruction: Clone a repository and all its submodules in one command.
steps.narrative: Get everything at once - the parent and all children.

steps.instruction: Check the status of all submodules.
steps.narrative: Survey all linked repositories at once.
